scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend && npm run lint --prefix chaincode
scripts.format: prettier --write "*.ts" && npm run format --prefix backend && npm run format --prefix frontend && npm run format --prefix chaincode
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix backend && npm run typecheck --prefix frontend && npm run typecheck --prefix chaincode
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.db:reset: ts-node setup_db.ts && ts-node db_migrate.ts && ts-node seed_massive.ts
